articles.title: Penalties
articles.summary: Three tiers: prohibited practices (EUR 35M / 7% turnover), other obligations (EUR 15M / 3%), misleading information (EUR 7.5M / 1%). Lower threshold for SMEs/start-ups.

articles.title: Fines on EU Institutions
articles.summary: EDPS may impose fines on EU institutions up to EUR 1.5M.

articles.title: Fines for GPAI Providers
articles.summary: Commission may fine GPAI providers: EUR 15M / 3% for non-compliance, EUR 7.5M / 1% for misleading information.
